message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "C1",
      "title": "Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry",
      "description": "Equip learners with tools to understand the working of chemistry, develop conceptual foundations for real-life application, and enable representation at macroscopic, molecular, and symbolic levels.",
      "competencies": [
        "Understand importance of chemistry and nature of matter",
        "Measure properties of matter and handle uncertainty in measurement",
        "Apply laws of chemical combination and Dalton's atomic theory",
        "Calculate atomic and molecular masses using mole concept",
        "Perform stoichiometric calculations and determine percentage composition"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry",
      "chapter_name": "Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry"
    },
    {
      "code": "C2",
      "title": "Structure of Atom",
      "description": "Enable learners to identify patterns in atomic structure and form connections underlying chemical phenomena through understanding sub-atomic particles, models, and quantum mechanics.",
      "competencies": [
        "Trace the discovery of sub-atomic particles and evolution of atomic models",
        "Explain Bohr's model for hydrogen atom and its developments",
        "Understand the transition towards the quantum mechanical model"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Structure of Atom",
      "chapter_name": "Structure of Atom"
    },
    {
      "code": "C3",
      "title": "Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties",
      "description": "Prepare learners to classify elements, understand periodic trends, and recognize the interface between chemistry and other disciplines through electronic configurations.",
      "competencies": [
        "Justify the need for classification and trace the genesis of periodic tables",
        "Apply modern periodic law and nomenclature rules (including atomic number > 100)",
        "Correlate electronic configuration with element types (s, p, d, f blocks) and position in table"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties",
      "chapter_name": "Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties"
    },
    {
      "code": "C4",
      "title": "Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure",
      "description": "Develop ability to represent chemical phenomena at molecular levels by understanding bonding theories, hybridization, and intermolecular forces.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply Kossel-Lewis approach to understand ionic bonding",
        "Analyze bond parameters and apply VSEPR theory for molecular shapes",
        "Utilize Valence Bond Theory and Molecular Orbital Theory concepts"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure",
      "chapter_name": "Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure"
    },
    {
      "code": "C5",
      "title": "Thermodynamics",
      "description": "Inculcate problem-solving skills to analyze energy changes, spontaneity, and equilibrium in chemical processes.",
      "competencies": [
        "Define thermodynamic terms and apply calorimetry for measurement of ∆U and ∆H",
        "Calculate enthalpy change for various reaction types"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Thermodynamics",
      "chapter_name": "Chemical Thermodynamics"
    },
    {
      "code": "C6",
      "title": "Equilibrium",
      "description": "Enable learners to identify patterns in dynamic equilibrium and apply the law of chemical equilibrium to physical and chemical processes.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish between homogeneous and heterogeneous equilibria"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Equilibrium",
      "chapter_name": "Equilibrium"
    },
    {
      "code": "C7",
      "title": "Redox Reactions",
      "description": "Prepare learners to analyze electron transfer reactions and electrode processes through oxidation numbers.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify redox reactions based on classical ideas and electron transfer"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Redox Reactions",
      "chapter_name": "Redox Reactions"
    },
    {
      "code": "C8",
      "title": "Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques",
      "description": "Equip learners with tools to understand organic compounds, their nomenclature, isomerism, reaction mechanisms, and purification techniques.",
      "competencies": [
        "Represent structural shapes of organic compounds (tetravalence of carbon)"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques",
      "chapter_name": "Some basic Principles and Techniques"
    },
    {
      "code": "C9",
      "title": "Hydrocarbons",
      "description": "Develop conceptual foundations to classify hydrocarbons and understand their properties including carcinogenic effects.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify alkanes, alkenes, alkynes, and aromatic hydrocarbons"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Hydrocarbons",
      "chapter_name": "Hydrocarbons"
    }
  ]
}
